name: _GET_PED_FROM_COVER_POINT
comment: returns the ped that is using this cover point created by ADD_COVER_POINT and adding the ped using tasks like `TASK_PUT_PED_DIRECTLY_(*`
research: Semble charger l'arme du ped pour les animations de couverture lorsque necessaire; -1 sert a la retirer du ped avant d'en demander une nouvelle.
lua:
-- 0x140B3CB1D424A945 · build 1207
local coverpoint = 0
local result = GetPedFromCoverPoint(coverpoint)

name: _ACTIVATE_COVER_LAYER
comment: activates a cover layer, these seem to be for specifc scenes in SP for example where a table is flipped using "grand_korr_poker_table_flipped" see more in levels\rdr3\coverlayers.rpf
research: Active une couche de points de couverture (cover layer), utilisee dans certaines scenes scriptees ou un element du decor sert d'abri.

name: _ADD_COVER_BLOCKING_AREA
comment:
args: f_0 = Volume Handle
f_1 = integer (?) (only the number 1 is ever used here, or is not used at all)
f_2 = integer (-1 to 32 in R* Scripts)

name: _DEACTIVATE_COVER_LAYER
comment: deactivates a cover layer activated with 0x64340DC208D671D5 coverLayer: see levels_0/levels/rdr3/coverlayers

name: _GET_PED_COVER_POINT_TRANSITION_STATE
comment:
returns the active transition state of a cover point for about 2 seconds unless its peeking
 1 - transition from pointing a gun to not pointing a gun
2 - transition to pointing a gun
3 - broke the window 
4 - when opening a door while in cover (a prompt will show and once pressed state is changed to 4)
5 - cover transition like from one corner of a house to the other corner
6 - changing cover to cover like crossing from one side of the door to the other
7 - when the ped is facing foward with the camera, might be to detect when going from left to right
8 - when the ped is peeking through a door window etc (this will return 8 while is in peek)
9 - when a ped is aiming in crouch and enters cover (it doesnt always trigger)
10 - enters cover
12 - leaves cover
16 - changed to crouch or to standing up position
research: Renvoie l'etat de transition actif d'un point de couverture pour un ped (changement de cale, visee, passage de couverture a couverture, etc.). *(OCR - a verifier)*
lua:
-- 0x957D7E750216D74B · build 1207
local ped = PlayerPedId()
local result = GetPedCoverPointTransitionState(ped)

name: _GET_COVER_POINT_STATE_FROM_PED
comment:
1 = In cover while crouched
2 = In cover while standing
3 = Not in cover

name: _REQUEST_FLINCH_COVER_ANIM
comment: Makes ped flinch (if in cover) like they have been shot at

name: _STOP_RUNNING_COVER_ANIMS
comment:
Stops running cover anims and releases them
_STOP_RENDERING_* - _STOP_SCRIPTED*
